title: Pure Simulation Core, Effect Adapters, Events, and Dependency Direction · Mastery Check
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss decisions for pure simulation core, effect adapters, events, and dependency direction and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, explicit limitations, and named browser, pygame-ce, SDL, display, input, audio, filesystem, packaging, GPU, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for testable game core and adapter architecture. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practi…
objectives: Model state transitions as deterministic functions over state, actions, time step, and injected randomness where practical.
Keep display, events, devices, audio, assets, persistence, clock, logging, and packaging behind thin owned adapters.
Emit immutable collision, score, life, wave, cue, and transition records and consume them in explicit order.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Pure Simulation · changed case · Quiz Pure Simulation
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Asteroids team handles case 9721 during a headless continuous-integration replay. Build deterministic Python evidence to separate deterministic domain state and systems from Pygame display, input, audio, clock, assets, and persistence adapters; retain player goal, revision, Python, pygame-ce, SDL, fixture, seed, input trace, viewport, and result identity; then run the packaged build with dummy video and audio drivers, missing optional sound, and a corrupted save. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates.

At Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Architecture Evidence, trace this concrete input and predict event, intent, simulation, collision, cleanup, rendering, cue, accessibility, failure, pause, rollback, recovery, and desktop evidence before reviewing it: A quiz Asteroids team handles case 3959 during a low-vision laptop playtest at 125 percent scaling. Build deterministic Python evidence to separate deterministic domain state and systems from Pygame display, input, audio, clock, assets, and persistence adapters; record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, playtest observation, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then replace an audio-only collision cue with synchronized text, shape, and optional sound evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Prove the pure core runs without pygame and the adapter composition runs headlessly without claiming visual or device quality.

For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Architecture Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with changed-frame-rate, stall, seam, input, device, collision, cue, accessibility, save, package, failure, recovery, and controlled desktop-transfer evidence: Headless import success proves the complete desktop game works.

options.text: For diagnose the hidden failure, run one convenient high-frame-rate happy path, omit revision, seed, input and time trace, units, seams, device changes, entity reconciliation, multichannel cues, accessibility settings, failures, recovery, and desktop transfer, then accept a playable animation as Asteroids proof. This does not satisfy Architecture Evidence for testable game core and adapter architecture.
Run the Architecture Evidence boundary case for testable game core and adapter architecture, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.

Accept the Architecture Evidence result because visible testable game core and adapter architecture output is the highest authority. That claim fails the diagnose the hidden failure evidence boundary for Architecture Evidence.

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Architecture Evidence
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Architecture Evidence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz Asteroids team handles case 4150 during a keyboard-only community arcade night. Build deterministic Python evidence to separate deterministic domain state and systems from Pygame display, input, audio, clock, assets, and persistence adapters; test empty, zero-vector, seam, low-frame-rate, focus-loss, device-loss, missing-asset, corrupted-save, and rejected cases; then replay the same input trace at 30, 60, and 144 presentation frames per second and compare simulation state. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Prove the pure core runs without pygame and the adapter composition runs headlessly without claiming visual or device quality.

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Architecture Evidence.
steps.why: Retrieving Architecture Evidence through the concrete testable game core and adapter architecture case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Architecture Evidence, keep Architecture Evidence connected to executable Python game-state, timing, input, collision, accessibility, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Prove the pure core runs without pygame and the adapter composition runs headlessly without claiming visual or device quality.
